'''''Star Wars Official Poster Monthly'' 10''' was published in July [[1978]] by [[Paradise Press]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*"The ''[[Star Wars]]'' Snowball", by [[John May]]: a discussion of the ''Star Wars'' phenomenon worldwide.
*"What It Takes to be a Space Pilot", by [[Michael Marten|Dr. M. F. Marten]]: a comparison and contrast of the qualifications needed to become a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] in [[The galaxy/Legends|the ''Star Wars'' galaxy]] and the qualifications of [[Wikipedia: Human spaceflight|real astronauts and cosmonauts]].
*"The Return of Evil!", by [[Calvin Lockhart]]: a preview of the duel between [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] in the recently-published novel ''[[Splinter of the Mind's Eye]]''.
